testcase.name: test_update_then_delete_merges_to_delete

failure.message:
AssertionError: assert [('k1', 'upda...1', 'delete')] == [('k1', 'delete')]
At index 0 diff: ('k1', 'update') != ('k1', 'delete') Left contains one more item: ('k1', 'delete')
Full diff: [ + ( + 'k1', + 'update', + ), ( 'k1', 'delete', ), ]

testcase.failure:
